global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a game interface and promotional text.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to join and play the game with friends.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Game interface
elements.description: A rectangular game interface showing four circular icons arranged in a grid.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A simple circular icon with a filled center, located at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: Another circular icon similar to the previous one, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A circular icon located at the center left of the ad, mirroring the top left icon.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A small right-pointing arrow icon located at the top right of the ad.

elements.label: Play with friends text
elements.description: A smaller text below the main headline, encouraging social play.

elements.label: Play with friends text
elements.description: Another instance of smaller text, located above the main headline.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located at the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold, prominent text that reads 'Join the arena' in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Join the arena Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Game title
elements.description: The title 'IronQuest' displayed prominently at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Claim reward'.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the game interface is in the center, and the CTA is at the bottom.
